---
title: "Experimental Design and Causal Inference Review"
subtitle: "Interventions, Estimands, Identification, Validity, and Governance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Causal question

State the intervention, comparison, outcome, unit, and time horizon.

## Estimand

Define ATE, ATT, LATE, CATE, ITT, or another estimand.

## Design and identification

Describe whether the analysis uses randomization, blocking, difference-in-differences, regression discontinuity, target-trial emulation, or an observational adjustment strategy.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
treated_mean = 0.0
control_mean = 1.0
ate = treated_mean - control_mean
print({"ate": ate})
```

## Validity review

State internal validity, external validity, interference, attrition, measurement, and sensitivity concerns.

## Appendix

Preserve study registry, assumptions, design checks, estimates, and robustness notes.
